external_expectation.direction_source: separate IMa2 HBB analysis; D sign alone is not directional
external_expectation.topology_caveat: true quartet is ((YBP_high,YBP_low),(ST_high,ST_low)), not a pectinate tree

filter_contract.cap_method: fixed-seed reservoir over eligible loci, restored to source order
filter_contract.filter: PASS or dot (sources are author-filtered releases)
filter_contract.polymorphism: both REF and ALT must be called in every declared three-population panel
filter_contract.variant: single-base REF and single-base ALT; no multiallelic ALT

simulation_feature_shift.reference: StandardScaler fitted to 2,700 positive regen_full summaries on the identical g=2..16 grid

simulation_head.interpretation: uncalibrated OOD scores; not probabilities or posteriors

external_expectation.head_caveat: the direction head has no no-event class and must emit A, B, or C

external_expectation.direction_caveat: D/f4 establish excess sharing, not direction by themselves; class C follows the paper's wild-to-crop interpretation
external_expectation.replay_caveat: canonical metadata uses FrijCol_11; the released scenario substitutes excluded FrijCol_10

simulation_head_audit.model: StandardScaler plus multinomial logistic regression (lbfgs, C=1)
simulation_head_audit.representation: mean and population SD over g=2..16 for each of 27 non-depth coordinates; identical to the external-panel depth grid
simulation_head_audit.score_interpretation: uncalibrated out-of-distribution score; not a probability or posterior
simulation_head_audit.training_selection: all positive canonical replicates at every migration rate

andean_ducks.metadata_note: Version 249308 is the current Dryad metadata revision (2023-08-16); the data files are unchanged from the deposited release.

runner_bean.license: No data or code license declared on the OSF node or GitHub repository; link and cite, do not redistribute the VCF or source code without permission.
runner_bean.sample_filter: Canonical cocci_meta.txt rows marked Included for the exact Table S4 population definitions
runner_bean.scenario_replay_caveat: The canonical 183-sample metadata retains FrijCol_11 and excludes FrijCol_10. Several released Dsuite scenario maps instead substitute FrijCol_10 while retaining an n=19 label. This manifest follows the canonical included set and is not claimed as a verbatim Table S4 replay.

status: exploratory external OOD diagnostics; not classifier validation
